text: Build a daily to-do / daily task system for JB OS
notes: Think through a recurring "daily tasks" feature — model it on the Musubi daily designer Claude built
description: Goal: bring a daily-rhythm layer into JB OS. Claude already built a Musubi daily activity system (the musubi-designer that auto-generates ~15 Instagram-ready concepts every morning on a schedule). Apply that same 'daily generated batch + scheduled trigger' pattern to a personal daily to-do system. Things to think through: (1) a 'Today' view that surfaces what matters each day; (2) recurring/daily tasks that auto-regenerate; (3) carry-over of unfinished items to the next day; (4) a morning trigger that assembles the day's agenda; (5) how Musubi daily activities feed in as their own daily track. Come back to this — it's a someday/maybe idea, not urgent.
